title: Spawn Filters
description: Allows you to create a blacklist to prevent certain entities from spawning
body: Is someone using snowballs in a lag machine? Think phantoms are stupid? Don't want certain mobs to spawn? Do you never ever ever ever want to see a bee, turtle, sniffer, or axolotl again? This plugin allows you to filter which mobs can spawn by adding undesirable mob ids to a blacklist. ## Usage Operators can use /addmob to add the Paper entity ids to the blacklist, eg "/addmob sniffer" (command is not case sensitive), /removemob to remove ids from the blacklist, or edit the config file directly and then use /reload to load the modified blacklist. ### WARNING. Many content plugins that add mobs actually use Paper entity ids under the hood, so expect conflicts when banning mobs that other plugins utilize.
